description: Evercrafted Visual Companion — Midjourney prompt packs for 10 wreath designs

prompt_packs.subject: heritage winter door wreath, thick fir, cedar and boxwood ring with asymmetrical weight on the left, pinecones and subtle antler picks, navy and green plaid ribbon woven through

base_camera.depth_of_field: moderate, wreath sharp, background slightly soft

base_environment.background: warm wood paneled door, minimal distractions

base_quality.notes: keep colors rich but not oversaturated; avoid heavy bokeh or extreme lens effects

hero.prompt: grounded nostalgic winter wreath on a warm wood front door, thick 22 inch fir cedar and boxwood ring, 85 percent full with asymmetrical weight on the left, small pinecone clusters and two subtle antler picks, navy and green plaid ribbon band woven around the greenery, classic Ralph Lauren lodge style, straight-on product shot, eye-level, warm wood paneled background slightly soft, soft overcast daylight, ultra realistic product photography, style raw
hero.notes: use for main catalog hero images; keep door and trim simple so the wreath remains the focal point

variations.prompt: same grounded nostalgic winter wreath on a dark charcoal paneled door, thick 22 inch fir cedar and boxwood ring, pinecone clusters and subtle antler picks, navy and green plaid ribbon woven through, cozy heritage cabin vibe, straight-on eye-level shot, moodier lighting with slightly deeper shadows, ultra realistic product photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: background shifted darker, wreath colors unchanged
dial.context_shift: door color changed from warm wood to charcoal
dial.camera_shift: same framing and angle

variations.prompt: heritage winter wreath on a warm wood front door, slightly fuller fir and cedar greenery, no antlers, emphasis on pinecone clusters and navy and green plaid ribbon, gentle snow visible in soft blur behind the door glass, straight-on eye-level product shot, soft bright overcast daylight, ultra realistic, style raw

dial.palette_shift: cooler highlights from snow, same wreath palette
dial.context_shift: adds subtle outdoor snowy context
dial.camera_shift: same framing, slightly brighter exposure

variations.prompt: close-up detail of the left side of a heritage winter wreath, thick fir, cedar and boxwood with pinecone clusters and navy and green plaid ribbon, classic lodge style, shallow depth of field, texture and needles in crisp focus, background fully blurred, ultra realistic macro product photography, style raw

dial.density_shift: local density appears higher due to close crop
dial.palette_shift: no change
dial.context_shift: background abstracted to soft blur
dial.camera_shift: close-up crop with shallow depth of field

prompt_packs.subject: minimalist modern door hoop, black metal ring, 70 percent negative space, seeded eucalyptus and olive band from 7 to 11 o'clock, matte brass disc accents, leather hanging strap

base_environment.background: matte white or light concrete wall
base_environment.lighting: clean studio light, no harsh shadows

base_quality.notes: emphasize negative space and structural quality of the metal hoop; avoid busy backgrounds

hero.prompt: sophisticated minimalist 18 inch black metal hoop wreath, 70 percent open space, tight band of seeded eucalyptus and olive branches from lower left to upper left, two small matte brass disc accents near 9 o'clock, narrow leather hanging strap at top, straight-on eye-level product shot, matte white wall background, clean studio lighting, ultra realistic product photography, style raw
hero.notes: hero should feel editorial and restrained; the negative space is the design feature

variations.prompt: minimalist black metal hoop wreath on a dark charcoal concrete wall, seeded eucalyptus and olive band, matte brass accents, leather strap, moody dramatic lighting with single directional light source, ultra realistic product photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: background darkened to near-black concrete
dial.context_shift: wall texture changed to concrete
dial.camera_shift: same framing, lower key lighting

variations.prompt: minimalist black metal hoop wreath, slightly denser eucalyptus and olive band with added silver-green ruscus, matte brass disc accents, leather strap, straight-on eye-level shot, warm white plaster wall, gentle warm afternoon light, ultra realistic, style raw

dial.palette_shift: warm white wall, gentle golden light added
dial.context_shift: wall texture changed to warm plaster
dial.camera_shift: same framing, warmer exposure

variations.prompt: close-up of a minimalist black metal hoop with seeded eucalyptus and matte brass accent discs, crisp macro detail, shallow depth of field, metal ring texture visible, background soft white blur, ultra realistic macro product photography, style raw

dial.density_shift: no change, close crop amplifies texture
dial.palette_shift: no change
dial.context_shift: abstracted to macro detail shot
dial.camera_shift: macro with shallow depth of field

prompt_packs.subject: late summer grapevine wreath, diagonal swag of magnolia leaves and sunflowers from 2 to 7 o'clock, honey-colored wooden beads, mustard cotton ticking stripe ribbon

base_environment.background: white painted wood door, porch visible at edges
base_environment.lighting: warm late afternoon sun, soft golden light

base_quality.notes: golden hour warmth is essential to the mood; sunflowers should face slightly outward, not straight forward

hero.prompt: welcoming cheerful 20 inch grapevine wreath with diagonal swag of magnolia leaves and five small sunflowers from upper right to lower center, honey-colored wooden beads on a loop near 4 o'clock, mustard cotton ticking stripe ribbon tied at 5 o'clock, 40 percent exposed vine at top left, straight-on eye-level shot, white painted front door background, warm golden afternoon light, ultra realistic product photography, style raw
hero.notes: exposed vine at top left is key to the asymmetry; keep top-left completely bare for clean negative space

variations.prompt: same late summer grapevine wreath with sunflowers and magnolia leaves, diagonal swag composition, mustard ribbon, shot in bright midday light on a sage green painted front door, more vibrant and energetic feel, straight-on product shot, ultra realistic, style raw

dial.palette_shift: door changed to sage green, brighter midday light
dial.context_shift: door color changed to sage green
dial.camera_shift: same framing, brighter midday exposure

variations.prompt: late summer porch wreath with magnolia swag, sunflowers and mustard ribbon, softer light as if overcast, muted warm palette, more relaxed welcoming mood, straight-on product shot on white door, soft diffused light, ultra realistic, style raw

dial.palette_shift: softer muted tones, overcast light reduces saturation
dial.context_shift: same white door, overcast sky light
dial.camera_shift: same framing, softer exposure

variations.prompt: lifestyle shot of a late summer grapevine wreath on a front door viewed slightly from the side, porch railing and plants visible at edges, warm golden hour atmosphere, natural home setting, wide enough to show door context, ultra realistic lifestyle photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: golden hour palette intensified by environment
dial.context_shift: expanded to lifestyle scene with porch visible
dial.camera_shift: wider shot with slight side angle

prompt_packs.subject: all-white wreath on white satin wrapped foam ring, continuous ring of white roses, ranunculus, and hydrangea tufts, soft halo silhouette, no ribbon

base_environment.lighting: soft even studio light, no hard shadows

base_quality.notes: critical to distinguish cool whites from warm whites in the florals; edge should feel diffused not sharp

hero.prompt: serene pure 18 inch all-white wreath, continuous ring of small white roses, ranunculus, and hydrangea tufts on a white satin-wrapped foam base, slight density bump at bottom, cool and warm white tonal variation in blooms, soft halo silhouette, no ribbon, straight-on eye-level product shot, seamless white background, soft even studio lighting, ultra realistic product photography, style raw
hero.notes: the tonal variation between cool and warm whites is what makes this feel luxe rather than flat; direct the AI to render subtle differences

variations.prompt: all-white wreath with roses, ranunculus, and hydrangea, same continuous ring composition, shot on a pale gray seamless background, slightly moodier soft studio light with gentle directional shadow, tonal whites, ultra realistic product photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: background shifted to pale gray, gentle shadow added
dial.context_shift: background tone changed to pale gray
dial.camera_shift: same framing, slight direction added to light source

variations.prompt: all-white wreath on a white door, styled with a single trailing ivory satin ribbon tucked loosely at base, bridal and ethereal atmosphere, soft natural window light from left, ultra realistic product photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: ivory ribbon adds warmth against cool whites
dial.context_shift: white door context, window light introduced
dial.camera_shift: same framing, natural side lighting

variations.prompt: macro close-up of the lower focal area of an all-white wreath, white roses and ranunculus in crisp detail, hydrangea tufts softly blurred at edges, shallow depth of field, seamless white background, ultra realistic macro product photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: no change
dial.context_shift: abstracted to botanical macro detail
dial.camera_shift: macro with shallow depth of field

prompt_packs.subject: moody contemporary winter wreath, thick evergreen ring with bold crescent from 3 to 9 o'clock, dried orange wheels, deep plum berries, charcoal velvet magnolia leaves, inky navy velvet bow

base_environment.context: front door, evening or moody atmosphere
base_environment.background: near-black painted door or dark navy door

base_quality.notes: burnt orange of dried citrus should pop against deep greens; berries in tight clusters not scattered

hero.prompt: dramatic energizing 22 inch winter evergreen wreath, bold crescent from 3 to 9 o'clock heaviest at 6, dried orange wheel slices in lower half, deep plum faux berry clusters, two charcoal velvet magnolia leaves, inky navy velvet bow with angled tails at 7 o'clock, dark navy painted door background, low-key directional lighting with dramatic shadows, straight-on product shot, ultra realistic product photography, style raw
hero.notes: oranges must stay below 3 and 9 o'clock line; berry clusters in tight groups of 2-3 not scattered individually

variations.prompt: same moody winter wreath on a deep forest green door, bold crescent with dried oranges, plum berries, charcoal velvet magnolia leaves, navy bow, richer jewel-tone atmosphere, slightly warmer directional light, ultra realistic product photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: background shifted to deep forest green, warmer light
dial.context_shift: door color changed to deep forest green
dial.camera_shift: same framing, warmer light temperature

variations.prompt: moody winter wreath on black door, crescent composition with dried oranges and plum berries, replace velvet bow with narrow black satin ribbon, more editorial fashion-adjacent aesthetic, single spotlight from above, ultra realistic product photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: black door, black ribbon, spotlight creates high contrast
dial.context_shift: door changed to black, ribbon swapped to black satin
dial.camera_shift: same framing, spotlight from directly above

variations.prompt: close-up of the focal crescent area of a dramatic winter wreath, dried orange slices and deep plum berry clusters in crisp detail against thick dark cedar greenery, shallow depth of field, charcoal velvet magnolia leaf visible at edge, ultra realistic macro product photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: no change
dial.context_shift: abstracted to botanical macro detail
dial.camera_shift: close-up macro with shallow depth of field

prompt_packs.subject: preserved moss-covered foam ring, uniform circular silhouette, small wood rounds and twig slices tucked low, single miniature feather, coarse linen hanging loop

base_environment.background: pale linen or raw wood wall
base_environment.lighting: soft even diffused light, no hard shadows

base_quality.notes: moss texture must read clearly; accents should feel discovered not displayed; clean circular silhouette is essential

hero.prompt: grounded restorative 18 inch preserved moss wreath on a pale raw wood wall, uniform moss-covered ring with clean circular silhouette, two slightly raised areas of moss at 4 and 10 o'clock, three small wood round slices and lichen patches tucked low, single tiny feather, coarse linen hanging loop at top, no ribbon or bow, straight-on eye-level shot, soft even diffused light, ultra realistic product photography, style raw
hero.notes: the wreath should feel like something you would find in nature; no obviously artificial elements; accents must be discoverable not decorative

variations.prompt: preserved moss wreath on a dark slate or aged wood wall, same clean circular silhouette and tucked wood round accents, moodier atmospheric lighting as if filtered through forest canopy, ultra realistic product photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: darker background emphasizes green of moss
dial.context_shift: wall changed to dark slate or aged wood
dial.camera_shift: same framing, forest-filtered lighting

variations.prompt: preserved moss wreath styled on a pale linen-textured interior wall, soft morning window light from the left, a single small dried wildflower added near 6 o'clock, restful and domestic atmosphere, ultra realistic product photography, style raw

dial.density_shift: one tiny wildflower addition at base
dial.palette_shift: warm morning light shifts moss to golden green
dial.context_shift: interior linen wall, morning light context
dial.camera_shift: same framing, natural left-side window light

variations.prompt: macro close-up of moss wreath surface, preserved moss texture in crisp botanical detail, small wood round slice and lichen patch visible, shallow depth of field, background abstracted to green blur, ultra realistic macro product photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: no change
dial.context_shift: abstracted to botanical macro surface
dial.camera_shift: macro with shallow depth of field

prompt_packs.subject: white-painted grapevine ring, 50 percent exposed, icy frosted eucalyptus and cedar crescent from 1 to 5 o'clock, small clear acrylic crystal drops, pale silver ball ornaments, narrow silver-gray chiffon ribbon tail

base_environment.background: white painted door or pale gray door
base_environment.lighting: bright cold winter daylight, crisp and even

base_quality.notes: crystal drops should catch light with subtle sparkle; painted vine must read clearly through top-left arc; chiffon ribbon tail drapes naturally

hero.prompt: cool elegant 20 inch white-painted grapevine wreath, 50 percent exposed vine at top left, icy frosted eucalyptus and cedar crescent from 1 to 5 o'clock, five small clear acrylic crystal drops clustered near center of crescent, two pale silver ball ornaments, narrow silver-gray chiffon ribbon with long tail falling from 3 o'clock, straight-on eye-level shot on white painted door, bright cold winter daylight, ultra realistic product photography, style raw
hero.notes: white vine must be visibly distinct from the white door; use shadow and texture to differentiate; crystal drops should sparkle subtly

variations.prompt: white-painted grapevine frost wreath on a pale ice-blue door, frosted eucalyptus and crystal drops, silver chiffon tail, more ethereal and dreamlike atmosphere, bright cold light, ultra realistic product photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: door shifted to pale ice-blue, complementing the cool palette
dial.context_shift: door color changed to pale ice blue
dial.camera_shift: same framing, slightly cooler color temperature

variations.prompt: winter frost wreath at dusk, frosted eucalyptus and cedar crescent with crystal drops catching last warm light against cooling blue-gray sky, porch exterior context, cinematic atmospheric, ultra realistic lifestyle photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: warm-cool contrast of dusk light against icy wreath
dial.context_shift: expanded to dusk exterior porch setting
dial.camera_shift: wider shot with sky and porch visible

variations.prompt: close-up macro of frosted eucalyptus and clear crystal accent drops on a winter wreath, ice crystals and frosted needles in crisp botanical detail, silver ornament barely visible at edge, shallow depth of field, white background abstracted, ultra realistic macro product photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: no change
dial.context_shift: abstracted to crystal and botanical macro
dial.camera_shift: macro with shallow depth of field

prompt_packs.subject: muted autumn grapevine wreath, wide light arc across top from 9 to 3 o'clock, eucalyptus and dried wheat stems, three small muted sage and cream pumpkins, taupe bunny tails grass, wide gauze ribbon loosely woven

base_camera.depth_of_field: moderate, wreath sharp, background softly blurred

base_environment.background: warm taupe or pale wood door
base_environment.lighting: soft warm afternoon light, gentle shadows

base_quality.notes: pumpkins must be muted sage and cream, not orange; bottom third of wreath should be mostly bare vine; wheat follows ring curve outward

hero.prompt: reflective cozy 20 inch grapevine wreath, wide light arc of eucalyptus and dried wheat across top from 9 to 3 o'clock thickest at 11 to 1, three small muted sage and cream faux pumpkins staggered vertically along arc, taupe bunny tails grass tucked between, wide gauze ribbon in warm taupe loosely woven between pumpkins without a bow, bottom third bare vine exposed, straight-on eye-level product shot, warm taupe door background, soft warm afternoon light, ultra realistic product photography, style raw
hero.notes: pumpkins must be muted and earthy, not bright orange; loosely woven ribbon has no formal bow

variations.prompt: muted autumn top arc wreath on a sage green door, eucalyptus and wheat with cream and sage pumpkins, gauze ribbon, slightly more color saturation, warm afternoon sun, straight-on product shot, ultra realistic, style raw

dial.context_shift: door changed to sage green
dial.camera_shift: same framing, slightly warmer exposure

variations.prompt: muted harvest arc wreath styled in an interior home setting, hanging on a white wall above a console table with dried grasses and a small pumpkin on the table below, lifestyle vignette, warm ambient interior light, ultra realistic lifestyle photography, style raw

prompt_packs.subject: colorful full-coverage foam or evergreen ring, 20 to 30 multicolor felt balls and pom-poms distributed around ring, three star-shaped ornaments near 2 o'clock, wide white grosgrain ribbon with multicolor polka dots

base_environment.lighting: bright even daylight, clean and cheerful

base_quality.notes: no single color should dominate more than 25 percent; pom-poms on outer and mid ring only; inner circle stays relatively clean

hero.prompt: joyful playful 18 inch full-coverage wreath with 25 multicolor felt balls and pom-poms in primary colors and pastels evenly distributed around ring, three star-shaped ornaments clustered near 2 o'clock, wide white grosgrain ribbon with multicolor polka dots tied at 2 o'clock, inner circle relatively clean, straight-on eye-level product shot, white door background, bright even daylight, ultra realistic product photography, style raw
hero.notes: colors must be evenly distributed; no two same-color pom-poms adjacent; inner circle must stay open

variations.prompt: playful multicolor pom-pom wreath on a bright yellow door, same full-coverage ring of felt balls and stars, polka dot ribbon, even more vibrant and energetic atmosphere, bright midday light, ultra realistic product photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: yellow door amplifies primary color energy
dial.context_shift: door changed to bright yellow
dial.camera_shift: same framing, slightly increased brightness

variations.prompt: pastel version of a playful pom-pom wreath, same full-coverage ring composition with felt balls in soft pastels only, lavender, mint, peach, butter yellow, no primary colors, star ornaments in pale gold, soft pink ribbon, white door, soft diffused studio light, ultra realistic product photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: full shift from primary to pastel palette

variations.prompt: lifestyle shot of a colorful pom-pom wreath on a front door with a child's hand reaching toward it from the side of frame, playful domestic moment, bright natural light, joyful atmosphere, ultra realistic lifestyle photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: warm natural light enhances vibrancy
dial.context_shift: lifestyle moment with child's hand added

prompt_packs.subject: simple grapevine wreath, 60 to 70 percent exposed vine, compact soft triangle cluster from 4 to 6 o'clock only, short olive or boxwood sprigs, three small beige wooden beads on a loop, two dried bunny tails, thin oatmeal linen band with simple knot

base_environment.context: interior or exterior door, everyday setting
base_environment.background: warm white or natural linen wall
base_environment.lighting: soft even diffused light, no drama

base_quality.notes: cluster must not exceed one third of total circumference; all visual weight anchored at bottom; nothing points straight upward

hero.prompt: calm orderly 18 inch grapevine wreath, 65 percent exposed natural vine, compact soft triangle cluster from 4 to 6 o'clock only of short olive sprigs, three small beige wooden beads on a tiny loop, two dried bunny tail grass stems, thin oatmeal linen ribbon in simple knot at 5 o'clock with short tails, no stems pointing upward, straight-on eye-level product shot, warm white wall background, soft even diffused light, ultra realistic product photography, style raw
hero.notes: restraint is the design; the exposed vine is not negative space to fill but the intentional composition; cluster must stay in bottom third

variations.prompt: same minimal grapevine wreath with small olive cluster and oatmeal linen knot, styled on a pale sage plaster wall, soft morning light from the left, slightly warmer and more lived-in atmosphere, ultra realistic product photography, style raw

dial.palette_shift: sage plaster wall adds subtle color warmth
dial.context_shift: wall changed to pale sage plaster
